rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is wholly unrelated to Educ. Code §12.1164, which governs commissioner notice to the Teacher Retirement System regarding charter school status changes. No overlap exists.
quote: The commissioner must notify the Teacher Retirement System of Texas in writing of the revocation, denial of renewal, expiration, or surrender of a charter under this subchapter not later than the 10th business day after the date of the event.
_note: No conflict. The rule_text concerns charter school notification procedures and has no bearing on property tax homestead exemption amounts.
